query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: An eye with visible iris and eyelashes, rendered in warm orange and yellow tones with a cooler blue-purple center at the pupil, positioned horizontally across the frame with a glowing circular light source behind it.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An eye with visible iris and eyelashes, rendered in warm orange and yellow tones with a cooler blue-purple center at the pupil, positioned horizontally across the frame with a glowing circular light source behind it. The image uses heavy intentional motion blur and double exposure techniques that streak and ghost the eye across the frame, creating layered transparent duplicates. The color palette is intensely saturated yet simultaneously washed out into opacity, with blown-out highlights at the center dissolving into surrounding crushed shadows. The surreal horizontal orientation of the eye and dreamlike abstraction reduce the subject to symbolic, unrecognizable form.
